title: trematolobelia macrostachys
intro: Trematolobelia macrostachys, also known as the Hawaiian lobelia, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii and the Marquesas Islands. It is a shrub-like perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been used in herbal medicine to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Trematolobelia macrostachys can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it a popular remedy in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
